headings.usage: Oversized, dramatic headlines. Use italic sparingly for contrast within a single line.

body.usage: Clean, highly legible body text and UI labels.

mono.usage: Code snippets, technical metrics, and small overlines.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: 12-column CSS Grid. Aggressive asymmetry. Do not perfectly center content.
spacing_and_layout.gap_strategy: Wide gaps (gap-12 to gap-24) between major sections to let content breathe.

sections.name: Hero
sections.requirements: Massive typography (Playfair Display) taking up 70% of the screen. Include a 'Live Availability Card' (floating, glassmorphism, glowing dot indicating 'Available'). Subtle abstract texture in the background. Scroll indicator.
sections.interactivity: Kinetic text entry on load. Hover over 'Frontend Developer' to trigger a text reveal or distinct color transition.

sections.name: About
sections.requirements: Editorial magazine layout. Text wrapped around or overlapping a portrait/workspace image. Use a mix of serif italic and sans-serif for the narrative.

sections.name: Skills
sections.requirements: Instead of boring grids, use an infinite slow-moving marquee (react-fast-marquee) for categories (e.g., 'React • GSAP • Tailwind • Next.js') overlaid with a brutalist sans-serif list for proficiency levels.

sections.name: Experience
sections.requirements: Minimalist vertical timeline. Years in oversized serif, roles in crisp sans-serif. Left heavy border that fills up on scroll.

sections.name: Project Story Mode (Portfolio)
sections.requirements: A grid of 4-6 project cards. Clicking a card opens a full-screen layout showing an 8-step journey: Problem -> Research -> Design -> Development -> Challenges -> Solution -> Impact -> Live Demo.
sections.interactivity: Framer Motion LayoutGroup for seamless expansion from card to full page. Scroll-driven animations.

sections.name: Before vs After Redesigns
sections.requirements: Side-by-side image comparison component with a draggable slider. Show performance scores (e.g., 'Lighthouse 65 -> 99') underneath using the monospace font.

sections.name: Design Playground
sections.requirements: A bento grid ('Tetris' mode) showcasing UI experiments. Must include: 1) 3D tilt card, 2) Magnetic button, 3) Glassmorphism panel, 4) Micro-interactions (hover animations).
sections.interactivity: Heavy interaction. Every card responds differently to mouse movement.

sections.name: Why Work With Me
sections.requirements: 8 minimalist trait cards (Fast Communication, Pixel Perfect, SEO First, Performance Focused, Scalable Code, Clean Architecture, AI Ready, Business Mindset). Icons from lucide-react. Strict borders (1px solid border_color) to give a structural/Swiss feel.

sections.name: Contact Form
sections.requirements: Minimalist form placed on a solid block (e.g., #0F0F0F background, #F7F5F0 text) at the bottom. Input fields should be bottom-border only. Saves to MongoDB.
sections.interactivity: Form submission state changes. Floating labels on input focus.

components.live_availability_card: Floating component, fixed or sticky. Glassmorphism background. Green glowing dot for 'Available'. text-xs monospace.
components.buttons: Magnetic buttons (Framer Motion). Base is border-only, hover state fills with accent color (Electric Vermilion) and text turns white. Rounded full (pill shape) for a touch of elegance.
components.cards: For projects: Image-heavy, text hidden until hover, or simple minimal text below image. No heavy drop shadows; use 1px borders or very subtle ambient shadows.

animations.page_load: Staggered text reveal (words shifting up from a mask).
animations.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth scrolling. Elements fade and translate up slightly on entering viewport (Framer Motion whileInView).

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, sliders, project cards) MUST have descriptive data-testid attributes (e.g., hero-contact-button, project-card-1, contact-form-submit). This is CRITICAL.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Configure the exact color palette in Tailwind. 2. Implement 'Playfair Display' and 'DM Sans'. 3. Build each section prioritizing the specified experimental typography and layouts. 4. Heavily utilize framer-motion for the requested Project Story Mode transitions and Magnetic Buttons. 5. Setup MongoDB connection for the contact form and handle API routes accordingly. 6. DO NOT FORGET data-testid attributes everywhere.
